description: Perform a mail merge in LibreOffice Writer using the library book renewal notice template at /home/ga/Documents/letter_template.docx and the patron data source at /home/ga/Documents/patrons.csv. The template contains placeholder fields: {Name}, {Address}, {City}, {State}, {BookTitle}, and {DueDate}. Generate personalized letters for all records in the CSV, separated by page breaks, and save the final merged document to /home/ga/Documents/merged_letters.docx.
